title: ampelopsis delavayana var. gentiliana
intro: Ampelopsis delavayana var. gentiliana, also known as a type of grapevine, is a plant species native to China and Vietnam. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ampelopsis delavayana var. gentiliana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
